title: Monitoring: NetFlow Monitor Apply (R1 e0/0), IP SLA ICMP Echo (300s, PC1), SPAN Session 12 (VLAN 12)
guidelines: Refer to the Tasks tab to view the tasks for this lab item.
Refer to the Topology tab to access the device console(s) and perform the tasks.
Console access is available for all required devices.
Do not remove any existing configurations from the devices.
Do not change the enable password or hostname for any device.
Save your configurations to NVRAM before moving to the next item.
tasks: The Operations team started configuring several monitoring activities. Complete the configurations for the tasks below.
1. Enable Flexible NetFlow on R1 E0/0 in both directions using the pre-configured flow monitor.
2. Configure the switch port analyzer on Sw1 and mirror all VLAN 12 traffic to interface E1/3 using session number 12.
3. Configure a basic IP SLA ICMP echo operation on R1 to ping PC1 every 300 seconds.

required.line: ip sla schedule 10 life forever start-time now

hints: R1'de 'show flow monitor' ile monitor adının Monitor-R1Flow olup olmadığını doğrula; e0/0 altında input ve output ayrı ayrı uygulanır.
IP SLA hedefi PC1 = 10.12.1.2, frequency 300; 'ip sla schedule 10 life forever start-time now' ile başlatılır.
SPAN VLAN kaynağı: 'monitor session 12 source vlan 12 both' + 'monitor session 12 destination interface e1/3'.
answer_key_raw:
R1:
R1> enable
R1# configure terminal
R1(config)# ip sla 10
R1(config-ip-sla)# icmp-echo 10.12.1.2
R1(config-ip-sla-echo)# frequency 300
R1(config-ip-sla-echo)# exit
R1(config)# ip sla schedule 10 life forever start-time now
R1(config)# interface Ethernet0/0
R1(config-if)# ip flow monitor Monitor-R1Flow input
R1(config-if)# ip flow monitor Monitor-R1Flow output
R1(config-if)# end
R1# write

Sw1:
Sw1> enable
Sw1# configure terminal
Sw1(config)# monitor session 12 source vlan 12 both
Sw1(config)# monitor session 12 destination interface e1/3
Sw1(config)# end
Sw1# write
explanation: Item 05 ailesinin varyantı (birleşik izleme labı): Önceden tanımlı flow monitor (Monitor-R1Flow) R1 e0/0 altında input ve output yönlerinde ayrı ayrı uygulanır. IP SLA ICMP echo hedefi PC1'dir (10.12.1.2), frequency 300 saniye; schedule edilmeden başlamaz. SPAN'de VLAN 12'deki tüm trafik (both) session 12 ile e1/3'e aynalanır.
